exploration_notes: The SharedInformer factory implementation in kubernetes/kubernetes lives under staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/ (the staging area for the client-go module). The architecture has three layers: (1) **Informer registration** — `informers/factory.go` defines `sharedInformerFactory` which implements `SharedInformerFactory`, with `InformerFor()` registering per-type informers and `Start()` launching them; `informers/generic.go` provides the `GenericInformer` wrapper; `internalinterfaces/factory_interface
